title: Mika Watanabe
compiled_truth: Mika Watanabe is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-31 to 2002-01-11), Mika Watanabe sent 7 and received 112 emails, totalling 119 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (6), [Jackie Gentle](people/jackie-gentle) (4), [Nicholas O'Day](people/nicholas-o-day) (4), [Eva Hoeffelman](people/eva-hoeffelman) (4), [Vance Meyer](people/vance-meyer) (4).
